calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Candace Walton. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendants Robert Lee and Anthony Lee are present.
Attorney Kristen Messer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jean Mileff, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAR-26-2012 is vacated.
